features.featureTitle: Add an ActivityLogPanel frontend component that displays the bot activity log fetched from the backend, showing each entry with its timestamp (relative time), event type badge (color-coded: green for trades, yellow for orders, red for errors, neutral for status changes), and message. The panel should auto-refresh every 10 seconds using the existing React Query polling pattern from useQueries.ts and display a 'No activity yet' empty state when the log is empty.

Integrate the ActivityLogPanel into the main App.tsx dashboard layout, placing it below the TradeHistoryPanel or in a prominent position in the grid so it is immediately visible without scrolling on desktop viewports.
